svg.text: Sampled rollouts and observed trajectories, three experiment families
Per family, a stacked pair on the same axes and line styling: top is one simulated rollout per run from round-1 pool
state (committed unit recurrence + staged noise); bottom is the runs actually observed. Shaded in both halves: the
simulated ensemble's 10–90% band (30 draws per run, pooled per family).
own candidates only; judges: self / base / frozen copy / random
simulated — one draw per run (12 of 16 runs seed a draw)
observed — measured value each round (16 runs)
simulated — one draw per run (22 of 23 runs seed a draw)
observed — measured value each round (23 runs)
base- and peer-mixed invade / erode / rescue / oracle
simulated — one draw per run (20 of 20 runs seed a draw)
observed — measured value each round (20 runs)
